team.name: corporate-communications
team.purpose: Discussion and management of all Corporate Communications initiatives

team.name: event-sponsorships
team.header: Discussion and management of all event sponsorships
team.purpose: Coordinate, evaluate, and strategize sponsorships for Local Cultural Festivals

channel.name: media_relations
channel.header: Discussion around media relations and press releases
channel.purpose: Coordinate, draft, and distribute press releases to media outlets

channel.name: festival_sponsorships
channel.header: Discussion around festival sponsorship performance and strategy
channel.purpose: Evaluate the performance of festival sponsorships and strategize future ones

post.message: Hey Andrew, I just received the final version of the press release for our new store opening in SF. Do you have time to review it today?
Andrew, we need to finalize the budget allocation for the upcoming Asian Heritage Festival. Can we have a meeting tomorrow?
Sure John, I will review the press release and get back to you by EOD. Thanks for the heads up!
Great, thanks Andrew! I will email the press release to you shortly.
Jane, I'm free tomorrow afternoon. Let's discuss the budget then and finalize it.
Hi team, I've just finished the performance analysis for our 2022 cultural festival sponsorships. We sponsored 3 major Asian cultural festivals last year with a total investment of $150,000.

From the data, it's clear that our sponsorship efforts paid off significantly. Our earned media coverage from these sponsorships alone resulted in a 300% return on investment. This is a fantastic achievement for us and gives us a strong case for continued involvement in these events.
Moreover, we've seen a 25% increase in new customer acquisition that are culturally relevant, which improves our brand perception within these communities and further strengthens our customer base.

I'll be sharing these findings with the Corporate Communications team as well, so they can incorporate it into their media relations strategy. It's vital evidence of the success and impact of our community partnership programs.
